'''√m-n-ng''' ('''mananga''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quahaug|quahaug]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-n-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quahaug|quahaug]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √m-n-ng
|-
! Lemma
| mananga
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || manangithi || manangiji || manangishi || manangi
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || mananguthuth || manangujuj || manangushush || manang
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || mananguthu || mananguju || manangushu || manangu
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || manangufuth || manangufuj || manangufush || mananguf
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || manangethe || manangeje || manangeshe || manange
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || manangothoth || manangojoj || manangoshosh || manang
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || manangotho || manangojo || manangosho || manango
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || manangofoth || manangofoj || manangofosh || manangof
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || manangïf || manangïf || manangïf || manangïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || manangïfïf || manangïfïf || manangïfïf || manangïfïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || manangïf || manangïf || manangïf || manangïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || manangïf || manangïf || manangïf || manangïf
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || manangæthæ || manangæjæ || manangæshæ || manangæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || manangathath || manangajaj || manangashash || manang
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || manangatha || manangaja || manangasha || mananga
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || manangafath || manangafaj || manangafash || manangaf
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || manangasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || gomanangasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || gokimanangasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || manangnüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || gomanangnknüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokimanangnüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || manangshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gomanangnkshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokimanangshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || manangroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || gomanangnkroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokimanangroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || manangmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || gomanangnkmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokimanangmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || manangsherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || gomanangnksherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokimanangsherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || manangngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || gomanangnkngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokimanangngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || manangyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || gomanangnkyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokimanangyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || manangyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || gomanangnkyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokimanangyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || manangnüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gomanangnknüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokimanangnüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || manangnüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gomanangnknüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokimanangnüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || manangnümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gomanangnknümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokimanangnümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || manangshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gomanangnkshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokimanangshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || manangshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gomanangnkshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokimanangshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || manangshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gomanangnkshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokimanangshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || manangronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gomanangnkronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokimanangronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || manangroshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gomanangnkroshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokimanangroshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || manangromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gomanangnkromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokimanangromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || manangmunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gomanangnkmunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokimanangmunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || manangmushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gomanangnkmushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokimanangmushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || manangmuroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gomanangnkmuroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokimanangmuroasha
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || manang
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || mænæng
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || homanang
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || homænæng
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || hohomanang
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || hohomænæng
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || nümanang
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || nümænæng
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || nünümanang
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || nünümænæng
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || nïmanang
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || nïmænæng
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || nïnïmanang
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || nïnïmænæng
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || lumanang
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || lumænæng
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || lulumanang
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || lulumænæng
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || limanang
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || limænæng
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || lilimanang
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || lilimænæng
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || komanang
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || komænæng
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || kokomanang
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || kokomænæng
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || kemanang
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || kemænæng
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || kekemanang
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || kekemænæng
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
